message.content:
@startuml
title Scheduled Events

actor "Recording Staff" as RecordingStaff
actor Coach

participant "IP/Mobile Cams" as Cams
participant "Consumer Apps" as Apps
participant "Security Gateway" as Gateway
control "Control Domain\n(win10/linux)" as ControlDomain
participant "Streaming Service\n(encoder)" as Streaming
entity "Media\n(mediaID)" as Media
participant "Transfer Service" as Transfer

Apps -> Gateway : authenticate(ID)
Gateway --> Apps : return(token)

Cams -> ControlDomain : register(endpoint)
Apps -> ControlDomain : register(token, priority)

RecordingStaff -> ControlDomain : createEvent(configuration{description, sources, consumers{priorities}})
activate ControlDomain
ControlDomain -> ControlDomain : create(newEvent)

RecordingStaff -> ControlDomain : start(newEvent)
ControlDomain -> Streaming : encode()

ControlDomain --> Apps : notify(recording)

RecordingStaff -> ControlDomain : stop(newEvent)
ControlDomain -> Streaming : saveAs(mediaID)
Streaming -> Media : save(mediaID)

ControlDomain -> Transfer : host(mediaID, consumers{token, priority})
ControlDomain --> Apps : notify(newMediaAvailable, mediaID, transferServiceEndpoint)
deactivate ControlDomain

alt [auto-download enabled]
  Apps -> Transfer : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
  Transfer --> Apps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
else [manual-download enabled]
  Coach -> Apps : showMedia(token)
  Apps -> Transfer : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
  Transfer --> Apps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
end

@enduml
